title: The Ruby Master 🏆
description: You've done it. You reached the end of the Ruby mountain.

slides.title: Congratulations! 🎉
slides.content:
You have officially completed the Progly Ruby Course!

You started from absolute zero, printing basic strings to the terminal, and you are now flawlessly writing custom Error Classes and utilizing advanced Metaprogramming hooks.

slides.title: The Ruby Way 💎
slides.content:
Always remember the core philosophy of Ruby:

1. Developer Happiness is the number one priority.
2. Everything is an Object.
3. Code should read like beautiful poetry.

slides.title: Next Steps 🚀
slides.content:
Where do you go from here?

- Build a real project using the Ruby on Rails framework!
- Learn about popular Ruby Gems to power up your apps.
- Create command-line tools for your daily tasks.

quizData.question: According to the creator of Ruby (Yukihiro Matsumoto), what is the primary goal of the Ruby language?

options.text: To be the fastest executing language on the planet.
To maximize Developer Happiness and make programming genuinely fun.

quizData.explanation: Ruby was designed specifically for humans, not machines. You are now officially a Ruby developer!
